properties.description: High-severity Insider Risk Management alerts surfaced to Sentinel via SIEM export.
properties.query:
union isfuzzy=true SecurityAlert
| where TimeGenerated > ago(1h)
| where ProductName has 'Microsoft Purview Insider Risk Management' or ProductName has 'Insider Risk'
| where AlertSeverity == 'High'
| project TimeGenerated, AlertName, AlertSeverity, CompromisedEntity, Description, Entities
